queries.exists: SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE (name LIKE 'RealVNC Viewer %' OR name LIKE 'RealVNC Connect Viewer %') AND publisher = 'RealVNC';
queries.patched: SELECT 1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM programs WHERE ((name LIKE 'RealVNC Viewer %' OR name LIKE 'RealVNC Connect Viewer %') AND publisher = 'RealVNC') AND version_compare(version, '8.4.1.10') < 0);
